name: Steal and Run | Brainrot Tsunami
author: Poki
description: Steal and Run is an online game featuring two exciting modes where chaos, speed, and strategy collide! In Classic Steal Brainrot Mode, your mission is simple: steal and collect all the Brainrot characters! Buy your favorite Brainrots, bring them back to your base, and watch them generate money for you—even while you’re offline. But beware! Other players are trying to steal them too. Sneak into rival bases, snatch their Brainrots, and defend your own turf to build the ultimate Brainrot empire. In Tsunami Mode, the action never stops. Run, jump, and grab as many Brainrots as you can while massive tsunami waves crash toward you. Timing and speed are everything—one mistake and it’s game over! Use your Brainrots to upgrade your base, unlock more slots, and place extra Brainrots for even higher profits before the next wave hits. Can you outsmart your rivals, survive the waves, and become the ultimate Brainrot master? How to play Steal and Run? Use WASD or the joystick to move. Press E to buy new characters. Who created Steal and Run? Steal and Run is created by emolingo games. Play their other games on Poki: Grow My Farm , Car Machines , Escape From Spider , Disaster Arena , Draw my Path Obby , Escape From School , Rainbow Obby and Sword Masters ! How can I play Steal and Run for free? You can play Steal and Run for free on Poki. Can I play Steal and Run on mobile devices and desktop? Steal and Run can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Steal and Run with my friend? Yes! Steal and Run is a single or online multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
